reviews.review_description: Salvador is like having my own boxing trainer with wicked music! The gloves are awesome, the music pumps me up and I learned new boxing skills. It's a blast training.

What a great fitness app this is 
Great music choices mixed with great routines at different difficulty’s 

A must have for Rhythm game fans 

Martin76x

reviews.review_title: 5 stars for exciting music and gameplay.
reviews.review_description: As a vr fitness enthusiast I enjoyed the gameplay with the varying levels of difficulty and techniques. Love the upbeat music too.

As a boxing coach I’ve really enjoyed having this app so I get to hit some pads myself 🥊 really got a sweat on and racked up the calories!

Also the developer is super responsive and great at listening to feedback and implementing change!
Devs quickly response and update the app about feedback!

Salvador is a great feeling boxing trainer workout app. It focuses on fitness first, not scoring points moving to the rhythm like most workout apps.

Instead of punching / hitting blocks or shapes to the beat of music, you will be training your boxing moves while listening to music. This feels like being in the actual gym working out in real life.

The app has a large selection of music to listen to, but focuses on your stance and boxing moves first. It's like having your own personal boxing coach in your home.

There is a wide range of modifiers to make each workout unique and to the style of workout you want. I was able to make a warmup routine to get my blood pumping, then an intense workout for my level of training, followed by a cool down routine. This brought me back to my days of body building in the gym and made me feel the heat like the real gym.

This app feels great and puts you into a boxing ring that makes you forget your standing in your home. Specially the 360 degrees mode, this made me feel like I was sparing with my gym buddy. I tested it out in a small play space and a large play space. Both worked amazing If you have the extra room to move around, you can really move around that ring and immersed even deeper into your workout.

If you are looking for a great workout and not a rhythm game with exercise as a side this is it. Its not just a fantastic workout, but also a great boxing sim. Put on your gym clothes, get a towel and some water and hit that ring with Salvador.

Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/Zz6qjiux_co

This game is my physical therapy 
I love this game for the start of my VR Fitness Everyday
I am really enjoying this game.
It is helping me with my Core, Posture, Movements and Coordination.
Love the new update.
Large variety of options on the menu and settings. The fact you can choose whether to use squats, adjust the speed, change the colour of your gloves to changing the music to suit your workout.
It AWSOME

reviews.review_title: the feeling of the jab is very real
reviews.review_description:
I really liked the feel of the punch, as you have to react very quickly to both jabs and uppercuts!
I almost died playing the 6 minute routine hhaha
unlike other exercise games where you only have to hit the target by passing it, in salvador it is not like that, since it forces you to make the jab very quickly to take the hit.

reviews.review_title: That's a cardio killer! great exercise
reviews.review_description:
That's a cardio killer! great exercise
I tried the high level and felt i still need some practice to get there

Ive just finished playing this game, and that feels great!

It has a large variety of music so i can always find music that matches my mood!
The game provides good exercise and i can really feel that my arms worked hard
The function of choosing whether to activate squats mode or not is really important!
Im glad i found this game on the Facebook groups

So I just got on it to look at the menu and see what the options are how it looks and from first impressions it looks like a pretty solid game I took time to play the tutorial and practice mode and I’m not seeing many problems the practice mode was was good and so was the tutorial. I would say that in the tutorial I think there should be a line that guides your hands for a proper swing at the gloves that could help out people who struggle with proper boxing form to hit the gloves correctly. During the practice I like how responsive the gloves are and the stance switch is a good addition to it as well. I played the practice on both easy and expert for a second and I can definitely tell the difference like how it tells you to punch harder. Even after only playing for about 3 minutes it’ll for sure give most people a good work out while also having fun with the music in the background. Overall first impression I say it’s a pretty solid game ✊🏿

Ive just had a new experience! the game is so different, my body automatically got into a boxing position and it felt really good!It was a bit hard for me to punch right at the beginning but i became good at it pretty fast!
After i used the tutorial i realized how to aim my punches the right angle, the right timing and so on,

Recommended!

reviews.review_title: Train the senses, eyes, brain, arms to w
reviews.review_description: Train the senses, eyes, brain, arms to work in relation to each other. Play often. The music in the game is easy to play with a mode to adjust the difficulty. considered a game Exercise that can be played by all ages.
I love this game, it’s a great workout and I highly recommend it.

reviews.review_title: This game is my new gym
reviews.review_description:
I think the best thing about this game is that the punches and the music are NOT synced.
I mean I really like the fast heavy metal playlist but my rhythm sucks lol so that came as a huge relief for me.
And I think that this makes more sense for a training routine, cus if one day there's a zombie apocalypse then im sure them zombies aren't gonna be running at me synced with my spotify playlist lololol

Another thing I liked is that you get constant feedback on your hits, so it's very easy to understand how to correct your mistakes.
Also IMO it feels to me like the developers really aimed at making this an actual boxing training program, so this game feels more like a personal trainer than a regular game, I mean I played a gazzilion games from oculus but this is the first one that got me picking up my quest every single day. Ive been at it for only 2 weeks now but I do feel like im improving! and whenever it feels like it gets too easy I just slightly increase the difficulty. 
btw the game setup is craazzyyy flexible, you can customize your session pretty much anyway you want it to be, even though that I saw it has sooo many options and features lol but now it's like a second nature.

Anyway this game deserves my 5 stars for sure!

I love that i can choose the speed of the practice and i love the music variety
I feel like i can learn boxing and do fitness activity at the same time

The best way to practice boxing without getting punched!! LOL 
It was a bit difficult at first
As I never tried boxing,
but I really got immersed into it... Good feeling!
Termino con la sensación de que entreno para ser realmente una boxeadora! Jajaja
